sn22.121:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, I will teach you the things that can be clung to and the clinging. Listen to that …
sn22.121:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, are the things that can be clung to, and what is the clinging? Form, bhikkhus, is a thing that can be clung to; the desire and lust for it is the clinging there. Feeling … Perception … Volitional formations … Consciousness is a thing that can be clung to; the desire and lust for it is the clinging there. These are called the things that can be clung to, and this the clinging."
